title: 12th Pass Jobs 2026 – Anganwadi Worker
shortInfo: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Recruitment 2026 for 03 posts of Anganwadi Worker. Candidates with 12TH Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through WCD Odisha official website.

basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Recruitment 2026 for 03 posts of Anganwadi Worker. Candidates with 12TH Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through WCD Odisha official website.

age_limit.maximum_age: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as of 01.01.2023
age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as of 01.01.2023
age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 12th pass (10+2 Standard) and knowledge of Odisha language.
qualification.details: Must be a woman. Must be a resident of the service area of the concerned Anganwadi Centre. Must be between 18 and 35 years of age as of the first day of the current year (01.01.2023). Minimum educational qualification of 12th pass (10+2 Standard). Must have knowledge of Odia language, i.e., must be able to read and write Odia clearly.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Anganwadi Worker post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Anganwadi Worker post is 08-06-2026.

faq.question: What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is passing the 12th standard (10+2) examination.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Anganwadi Worker post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as of 01.01.2023.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the official WCD Odisha website.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Anganwadi Worker post is temporary.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for Anganwadi Worker?
faq.answer: The post of Anganwadi Worker is an honorary post, meaning there is no fixed salary.

faq.question: Do I need to know Odia language to apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have knowledge of the Odia language, including the ability to read and write it clearly.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: What is the selection process?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on an evaluation of educational qualifications and additional qualification certificates, with candidates having the highest marks being selected.

seo_tags: Women and Child Development Department Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026
